Field contract + how to add an adapter: references/adding-an-adapter.md.

adapters.note: VALIDATE ON FIRST USE — not locally smoke-tested at design time. `--approval-mode plan` is gemini's read-only mode; it is softer than codex's `-s read-only` sandbox (it still permits writes to a plans dir and web_fetch), so it leans on the review-only contract. Fine for trusted artifacts; for untrusted code run gemini under an OS sandbox (Docker or macOS Seatbelt). See SKILL.md Risks.

adapters.note: VALIDATE ON FIRST USE — not locally smoke-tested at design time. `--permission-mode plan` is the read-only control (enum: default, acceptEdits, auto, dontAsk, bypassPermissions, plan; there is no `read-only` value). The `.result` envelope key is inferred from grok's Claude-Code-compatible lineage — confirm it parses on first use; if not, the prompt-enforced findings contract still lets the orchestrator extract the JSON from stdout text. Streaming token is `streaming-json`, not `stream-json`.
